claims.headline: Supports mood balance
claims.notesSentence: A Cochrane review summarized RCTs showing antidepressant effects vs. placebo in mood disorders.

claims.headline: Promotes restful sleep
claims.notesSentence: Reviewed clinical literature describes 5-HTP as a serotonin precursor with effects on sleep quality.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: 5-HTP serotonin and sleep review on PubMed
